# Skill: Document Methods with XML Comments

Use this skill to generate XML documentation comments (///) for C# methods when explicitly requested.

Instructions:
- Only add documentation when explicitly asked to document or comment specific methods.
- For each method, generate:
  - A short summary (in English)
  - <param> tags for all parameters
  - <returns> tag for the return value (if not void)
  - <exception> tags for any exceptions thrown (if applicable)
- Keep all descriptions concise and clear.

Example usage:
> Please document the following method with XML comments.

---

Note: This skill is global and can be used in any project.
